description_long: This doll features a whimsical, cartoon-like design with a large round head, oversized ears, and a prominent bow on top. Its face is expressive, with a wide open mouth, visible tongue, and a blue and white color scheme accented by black spots. The doll wears a light blue dress adorned with black polka dots, matching shoes, and black gloves with white details. The back of the head and body are solid white, while the front displays more facial features and color contrast. The overall build is stylized, with exaggerated proportions and simplified limbs. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, typical of plastic or vinyl toys.
description: A cartoonish doll with a large head, blue polka-dot dress, black gloves, and a big bow, featuring expressive facial details and a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's expressive face, large bow, blue dress with black spots, and black gloves.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the doll's profile, protruding mouth, and the layered look of the dress and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid white back of the head and body, with the bow and dress shape visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side profile of the face, bow, and dress.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a light blue, knee-length dress with black polka dots, paired with matching blue shoes and black gloves featuring white details. A large, polka-dotted bow sits atop the head, giving the outfit a playful, cartoon-inspired look reminiscent of classic animated characters.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs slightly apart, and head facing forward. The posture is static and symmetrical, typical of a display or T-pose.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a wide open mouth with a visible tongue, giving an impression of excitement or joy. The eyes are large and open, with no visible eyebrows, contributing to a cheerful and animated expression.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth and white, with a large polka-dotted bow as the main head adornment.
